chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No.D- 197 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1258/2023 (S/A) 19.11.2025 Mr. Fareed Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for Respondent-Bank >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the applicant. Mr. Fareed Ahmed Soomro, learned counsel for the Respondent-Bank submits that parties have patched up, therefore, the Execution Application for executing the impugned order has been withdrawn by Respondent-Bank. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the applicant, therefore, this Civil Revision Application having become infructuous is disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
